explanations.pt-br: Vector DB = array simples + embeddings. Sem ChromaDB, sem FAISS, sem servidor.
explanations.en-us: Vector DB = simple array + embeddings. No ChromaDB, no FAISS, no server.

explanations.pt-br: Embedding gerado on-the-fly no browser — cada documento vira um vetor.
explanations.en-us: Embedding generated on-the-fly in the browser — each document becomes a vector.

explanations.pt-br: Cosine similarity via dot product (vetores normalizados). Ordena e retorna top-k.
explanations.en-us: Cosine similarity via dot product (normalized vectors). Sorts and returns top-k.

explanations.pt-br: Busca semântica funciona: 'Quem criou o GPT?' encontra 'GPT-2 criado pela OpenAI'.
explanations.en-us: Semantic search works: 'Who created GPT?' finds 'GPT-2 created by OpenAI'.
